title: Take Your Accounting Firm from 20% to 35% Margin
description: Follow the same framework Jason Staats used to increase his $4M firm's margin from 20% to 35% in 18 months — by fixing your client list, pricing, and focus. No tech tricks — just hard business decisions.
globalInfo: Source: Jason Staats, CPA — LinkedIn post (2026-04-18 scrape). Core thesis: your firm's margin problem is a client list problem, not a tech problem. Fix clients first, then systems, then tech. Move low-margin clients along, use multi-tier pricing to reveal who wants to pay more, and find better clients through content and niche positioning.
